headline: Super vs Folk — personal AI agents compared for real computer work

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Folk. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs Folk

summary: A fair comparison of Super and Folk for people choosing a personal AI agent. Folk fits lighter automation and niche tools. Super is built for agents that actually operate computers — and reuse a computer-use cache so repeated workflows get faster and cheaper over time.
